questions.question: What is the main difference between a coin and a token?
options: A coin operates on its own blockchain while a token is built on an existing blockchain
A token operates on its own blockchain while a coin is built on another blockchain
Coins are always more valuable than tokens

questions.question: Which of the following is commonly used as a stablecoin?
Why is it important to understand a token before buying it?
options: Because every token will increase in value
Because knowledge helps you make better decisions and avoid mistakes
